description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a fenced yard featuring a well-maintained lawn, a row of trees, and a rectangular swimming pool. The house exterior is primarily white with large windows and a simple, boxy architectural form. The backyard includes a wooden pergola near the pool and a paved patio area, while the front is bordered by a dark fence with white posts and a gate. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The property is enclosed by a combination of wooden and metal fencing, providing privacy and security. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor space, and functional landscaping.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with a white exterior, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring a lawn, trees, and a swimming pool. The property includes a wooden pergola, paved patio, and a mix of wooden and metal fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, white facade, dark fence with white posts, and a row of trees along the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long stretch of lawn, row of trees, and the swimming pool at the back, with the house's plain side wall visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a wooden pergola, swimming pool, patio area, and wooden fencing enclosing the space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side, the row of trees, and the full extent of the backyard with the pool and pergola.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, accessed through a paved path and framed by a modern fence and gate.
